findings.title: Hardcoded secret detected
findings.description: The variable 'API_KEY' appears to contain a hardcoded secret.
findings.recommendation: Move secrets to environment variables or a secure secret manager.

findings.title: Use of eval() detected
findings.description: The eval() function can execute arbitrary code and may lead to remote code execution.
findings.recommendation: Avoid eval(). Use safe parsing or explicit logic instead.

security_gate.reason: Security gate failed because Critical vulnerabilities were detected.
security_gate.policy: FAIL if one or more Critical findings exist.

fix_suggestions.recommended_fix: Move hardcoded secrets into environment variables or a secure secret manager.
Remove eval/exec usage and replace it with safe parsing or explicit controlled logic.
fix_suggestions.example_fix: Use json.loads(user_input) for JSON data instead of eval(user_input).
